creator: lacibsd@gmail.com
text:
Update:

Dan Langille helped me compiling sssd-1.16.5_8 with ldb22-2.3.4. With this SSSD works as expected, it can be used to communicate with Active Directory for ssh auth with public key when the keys are stored in Active Directory. Probably kerberos auth also works, I didn't try yet.
SSSD also works to provide sudo roles when they are stored in Active Directory.
